title: Automate Timeline Creation with Board Template, Duration Column, and Timeline Column
excerpt: I created a board template with a duration and timeline column. I would like to be able to create a board from the template, choose the first date on the board, and the project timelines autofill based on the duration an…

posts.author: PriscillaTGH (Priscilla Rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a board template with a duration and timeline column. I would like to be able to create a board from the template, choose the first date on the board, and the project timelines autofill based on the duration and start date.

Basically, I don’t want to have to fill in the timeline each time I create a new board, especially when the duration is the same for each workflow.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PriscillaTGH - have you looked into using Dependencies? This will have a ripple effect on the timelines of your dependent tasks once you fill in the top/first task.

Hope this helps.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

posts.author: spelkey (Shannon Pelkey)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree @PriscillaTGH - the dependency column doesn’t work well for this and it feels like a basic feature for a project management system to create that within a workflow. We have been struggling to find a way around this with our workflows as well. Would like autofill dates!
